title: Azure Lighthouse architecture - Azure Lighthouse

Authorized users, groups, and service principals can work directly in the context of a customer subscription without having an account in that customer's Microsoft Entra tenant or being a co-owner of the customer's tenant. title: Cloud Solution Provider program considerations - Azure Lighthouse
display_title: Apply CSP AOBO and Lighthouse security controls
description: For CSP partners, Azure delegated resource management helps improve security and control by enabling granular permissions.
summary: If you're aCSP (Cloud Solution Provider)partner, you can already access the Azure subscriptions created for your customers through the CSP program by using the Administer On Behalf Of (AOBO) functionality. This access allows you to directly support, configure, and manage your customers' subscriptions. By usingAzure Lighthouse, you can use Azure delegated resource management along with AOBO. This approach helps improve security and reduces unnecessary access by enabling more granular permissions
classification_reason: Discusses combining AOBO with Azure delegated resource management to reduce unnecessary access; contains product-specific permission and access control guidance.

title: Cross-tenant management experiences - Azure Lighthouse
description: Azure Lighthouse enables and enhances cross-tenant experiences in many Azure services.
summary: As a service provider, useAzure Lighthouseto manage your customers' Azure resources from within your own Microsoft Entra tenant. You can perform many common tasks and services across these managed tenants. Tip You can also use Azure Lighthousewithin an enterprise that has multiple Microsoft Entra tenantsto simplify cross-tenant administration.

title: Azure Lighthouse in enterprise scenarios - Azure Lighthouse
description: The capabilities of Azure Lighthouse can be used to simplify cross-tenant management within an enterprise which uses multiple Microsoft Entra tenants.
summary: A common scenario forAzure Lighthouseinvolves a service provider that manages resources in its customers' Microsoft Entra tenants. You can also use Azure Lighthouse capabilities to simplify cross-tenant management within an enterprise that uses multiple Microsoft Entra tenants. In this scenario, users in one of the enterprise's tenants can perform management tasks on the other tenants through Azure Lighthouse, without requiring any other service provider to be involved.
